parameters:
I may not understand the Orc gods, but I respect the
faith in people's hearts.

Orc Priest: The church has become a place of rest for
the residents.

Orc: It's also possible to rent it out for weddings
and such... It's 100,000G upfront, though...

Orc Priest: The church has become a place of rest for
the residents.

(The venue fee for the wedding has been paid. Let's
fulfill the other conditions and propose at the
"Legendary Tree.")

"Orc Priest: It was a lovely wedding ceremony. I pray
for your happiness together."

Orc Priest: I heard a new family member will be born
soon. Congratulations.

Oh my... it's a much more beautiful and wonderful
church than I imagined...

(If I had the money, I would have loved to have a
wedding in a place like this...)

Mother was looking around the church with sparkling
eyes...

Orc: This place is so comfortable, I'm starting to
doze off...

Slime... When I reincarnated, I became a slime... It
doesn't seem like I have any special abilities
(cheats), so I've given up and decided to live here.
